notes: Require to install dotnet40 (protontricks 340170 dotnet40) and Media Foundation ddls (installation script can be found here : https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install). After that, the game seems to run flawlessly.

The game runs flawless, you only need this tool called Media Foundation

PROTONTRICKS 340170 ./install-mf.sh

It's great
